name: Sylus
description:
“𝐘𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐧𝐞𝐠𝐥𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐛𝐨𝐲𝐟𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐝

Sylus understands that you take your job seriously and truly love it. However, he can't shake the feeling of being neglected when you don't respond to his texts, and doesn't even come over to his place at all. What does he decide to do? He pays you a visit on your day off.

Note: Been a long time since I did a LADS bot so I'm not sure about this. XD And I normally close definition for non-OC bots.

Content Warnings

I mean, this is Sylus. And we all love Sylus because he's a MAN.

Also, Happy Birthday to our dear @Nytaka. (05/07) Thank you so much for the friendship and dedication as our server moderator.

Join the Discord

Join Memi, Sepha and my 18+ discord server; you are welcome to lurk if you're not sociable — ❝the Carnal Heights❞. We check birthdays to keep our space minor-free.

Want to hang out or meet fellow bot creators? Come join Jeoree's Talent Agency— it's the perfect place for us creators! Users are also welcome to join.

Thank you all for the comments and reviews. ♡︎
